creator: dada@sbox.tu-graz.ac.at
text:
/usr/src/etc/{csh.login,profile} contain examples of how to set
LANG, MM_CHARSET and LC_ALL.
This is obsolete. A more generic way to set this (independent of used
login shell) is via login.conf(5).

Fix: 

Take those examples out.
Add a hint to login.conf(5) and ~/.login.conf.
